title: Robin Is Carried Away
description: Franky and Sanji push deeper into the Sea Train while Robin and CP9 remain the true targets of the chase.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Sanji, Franky, Nico Robin, Spandam, CP9 agent. Franky and Sanji push deeper into the Sea Train while Robin and CP9 remain the true targets of the chase.

dialogue.text: Are you all brainless or something!!?
